headline: SMH ETF Investors: Watch Hyperscaler Capex Guidance at July Earnings Calls
summary: The VanEck Semiconductor ETF (NYSEARCA:SMH) closed Friday at $599, capping a stretch in which SMH has returned roughly 146% over the past year and tacked on nearly 20% in May alone. headline: U.S.-Iran Tensions, Inflation Data and Oracle Earnings Dominate Market Focus: Dow Jones, S&P, Nasdaq, Wall Street Futures

headline: Is Oracle's Q4 earnings the next big test for AI trade?
summary: The AI trade continues to stand on unsteady ground this week as semiconductor stocks waver. Oracle's (ORCL) fiscal fourth quarter earnings are due out after Wednesday's market close, which could ultimately be a tipping point for the AI sector. JonesTrading chief market strategist Michael O'Rourke speaks with Yahoo Finance Executive Editor Brian Sozzi about his outlook on the AI sector.

content.title: Is Oracle's Q4 earnings the next big test for AI trade?
content.description:
The AI trade continues to stand on unsteady ground this week as semiconductor stocks waver. Oracle's (ORCL) fiscal fourth quarter earnings are due out after Wednesday's market close, which could ultimately be a tipping point for the AI sector.

JonesTrading chief market strategist Michael O'Rourke speaks with Yahoo Finance Executive Editor Brian Sozzi about his outlook on the AI sector.
content.summary: The AI trade continues to stand on unsteady ground this week as semiconductor stocks waver. Oracle's (ORCL) fiscal fourth quarter earnings are due out after Wednesday's market close, which could ultimately be a tipping point for the AI sector. JonesTrading chief market strategist Michael O'Rourke speaks with Yahoo Finance Executive Editor Brian Sozzi about his outlook on the AI sector.

headline: Micron, SanDisk, and SK hynix Investors Should Fear One Thing: Elon Musk
summary: The semiconductor cycle has always moved in waves — shortage, oversupply, correction, repeat. But the current cycle feels different. Demand isn’t just being pulled forward by smartphones or cloud servers. It’s being reshaped by artificial intelligence infrastructure that requires vastly more memory, more bandwidth, and more advanced packaging than the industry was ever scaled to ... Micron, SanDisk, and SK hynix Investors Should Fear One Thing: Elon Musk

headline: This Week In AI Chips - AI Model NV2 Revolutionizes Business Interactions and Productivity
summary: Napster has introduced the NV2, a new real-time conversational video model aimed at making multimodal video agents more accessible and affordable for businesses of all sizes. Offering full HD, 30 FPS video at a cost significantly lower than current industry standards, NV2 is set to democratize the use of synthetic coworkers capable of executing complex tasks and engaging with clients. This innovation represents a shift towards more widespread adoption of embodied AI in business, potentially...

headline: Micron Adds AI Veteran To Board As Valuation Stretches On Hot Rally
summary: Micron Technology (NasdaqGS:MU) has added Dr. Alexis Black Björlin to its board of directors. Dr. Black Björlin is an experienced AI and semiconductor executive with prior leadership roles at NVIDIA, Meta, Broadcom, and Intel. The appointment brings deeper expertise in AI infrastructure, cloud platforms, and advanced semiconductor hardware to Micron’s governance bench. Micron Technology, trading at a recent share price of $935.89, has been one of the more intensely watched AI hardware...
